events.title: EMP Range Day
events.description: DC 215 EMP Range Day. Cyber labs full of different development tools, offensive/defensive emulation, and portable cyber range kit for prospective homelab and system engineering enthusiasts. 6-9 PM.

events.title: Study Hall / Work on CTFs
events.description: DC 215 Study Hall / Work on CTFs. Time to get together and work on or just discuss the CTF. 11 AM-1 PM.
